title: Classic Car Show Registration
description: A premium vintage-Americana multi-step registration form styled after classic 1950s roadside signage. Editable in MegaForm Builder. Features a photographic header banner with a wavy, transparent bottom edge that flows into a warm parchment form body. Deep barn-red and navy accents over cream, with a display-serif heading.

fields.label: Owner Details
fields.heading: Register your ride
fields.intro: Start with your details so we can print your entry pass and dashboard placard.

fields.label: Your Ride
fields.heading: Tell us about the machine
fields.intro: The good stuff. Judges use these details to place your vehicle in the right class.

fields.label: Notable Modifications
fields.placeholder: Rebuilt 283 V8, dual quads, lowered stance, whitewall tires…

fields.label: Show Options
fields.heading: Pick your package
fields.intro: Choose an entry package and any extras. All entries include a commemorative dash plaque.

options.label: Premier — both days, judged, prime row

fields.label: Confirm
fields.heading: Last stop before the open road
fields.intro: A few final details, then hit the gas and submit your registration.

fields.label: How did you hear about the show?
I have read and agree to the show rules and liability waiver.
I consent to my vehicle being photographed for event promotion.
